publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2020-05-16 00:14:46 -0400.

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: The collection consists of correspondence, photographs, newspaper clippings, biographical material and ephemera, bound volumes and original writings by Paul, including journals, notebooks and manuscripts.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Paul Brunton papers, #8692. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

bioghist.head: Biographical / Historical
bioghist.p: Paul Brunton was a British theosophist and spiritualist. He is best known as one of the early popularizers of Neo-Hindu spiritualism in western esotericism.

controlaccess.subject: Philosophy.
Spiritualism.
Theosophy.
Psychology
Religion.
Meditation
Yoga
Buddhism.
Occult.
Mystics
Vegetarianism
Monasteries
Architecture.
controlaccess.geogname: Tibet Autonomous Region (China) -- Description and travel.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Letters include from Maharaja of Mysore, Maharaja of Kashmir. Pictures included as well.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of yogis, various holymen, and scenes of India.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of Paul Brunton in Mysore, Japan, and Europe.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of Paul Brunton and various holymen.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of Tibetan monasteries, Himalayas, and Mysore royal family.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of sacred and courtly architecture from Delhi, Travancore, and Mysore.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of architecture and daily life from Mysore, Colombo, and Sri Lanka.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of Paul Brunton, various holymen, and royalty from India.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of various mystics and spirtualists.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of architecture and religious life from Angkor Wat, Bangkok, Cambodia, Indonesia, Burma, Indochina, and Japan.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Contains photographs of Sri Ramana Maharshi and varoius holymen across India and Tiruvannamalai.
